description: Short, no fluff, gets straight to the point. Best for high-volume recruiters who skim applications.

examples.title: Concise Application for Graduate Programme
examples.body:
25 March 2026

Dear Recruitment Team,

I am a first-class BSc Accounting graduate from UNZA with a GPA of 3.8, applying for your Graduate Programme.

Key strengths:
- Advanced Excel and financial modelling
- Completed industrial attachment at a Big Four firm
- President of the Accounting Society (2024-2025)
- Fluent in English, Nyanja, and Bemba

I am available immediately and eager to contribute to your audit team.

Yours sincerely,

Martin Ngoma

examples.title: Direct Cover Letter for WIL Placement
examples.body:
12 June 2026

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am a third-year Computer Engineering student at CBU seeking a six-month WIL placement in network engineering.

Relevant skills:
- Cisco CCNA certified
- Network simulation using Packet Tracer and GNS3
- Linux server administration
- Python scripting for network automation

I completed a successful attachment at a local ISP last year, where I assisted in network monitoring and troubleshooting.

I am available from July 2026.

Yours faithfully,

Brian Mfula

examples.title: Direct Application for Marketing Internship
examples.body:
8 August 2026

Hello Team,

I am applying for the Marketing Intern position. Here is why I am a strong candidate:

- Final-year Marketing student at Mulungushi University
- Managed social media for two student organisations, growing followership by 250%
- Created a digital marketing campaign for a campus event that sold 500 tickets
- Proficient in Canva, Meta Business Suite, and Google Analytics

I am passionate about brand storytelling and data-driven marketing. I am ready to contribute from day one.

Best regards,

Natasha Liywali
